name: Mental Model Mapping
what_it_is: Building explicit representations of how a system works - mapping inputs, mechanisms, feedback loops, and outputs.
core_mechanic: Define system boundary. Map key variables. Draw relationships. Identify feedback loops (reinforcing vs. balancing). Test by running hypothetical changes. Refine until it matches reality.
when_to_use: Trying to understand a complex domain you're new to / Explaining why something keeps happening despite fixes / Building intuition before making decisions
when_not_to_use: A simpler linear explanation is sufficient / Need to act fast
ideaos_application: Agent 3 drafts the mental model for the domain - key variables, relationships, most important feedback loop. Identifies where the person's current mental model is likely incomplete.
